peak heap memory consumption: 84.30M
peak RSS (including heaptrack overhead): 130.00M
total memory leaked: 2.50M
the largest leaks:
    1.20M leaked over 4096 calls from
        ros2_medkit_gateway::EntityCache::rebuild()
    0.80M leaked over 2048 calls from
        ros2_medkit_gateway::DiscoveryManager::refresh()
